label: 第144話
source_locator: 単行本17巻 目次 p.27
summary_short: 伏黒は虎杖へ、死滅回游に巻き込まれた津美紀を救うため協力を求める。虎杖たちは天元に会うため、薨星宮へ向かう。
summary_full: 伏黒は、羂索により死滅回游の泳者にされた津美紀が期限内に結界へ入らなければ術式を剥奪されると説明し、虎杖へ力を貸すよう頼む。虎杖は宿儺が再び支配した場合には乙骨が自分を殺すことを条件に同行を決める。乙骨・脹相とともに高専へ戻ると、真希、九十九、家入が合流する。五条解放と死滅回游への対応に必要な情報を得るため、一行は天元がいる薨星宮へ向かい、脹相の案内で空性結界の扉を探す。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Reunited for the first time since the 渋谷事変 , 恵 asks for 悠仁 's strength to help save 津美紀 from the 死滅回游 . In desperate need of information, an unlikely team hatches a dangerous plan to seek answers deep within 呪術高専 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: " I get it!! " With 津美紀 caught up in Pseudo-夏油 's sinister 死滅回游, 恵 asks 悠仁 to let go of his transgressions and help save his sister. Reminded of his last grandfather's words asking him to help others, 悠仁 comes up with a compromise. He asks 憂太 to kill him in the event that 宿儺 should take over his body again. 悠仁 believes 憂太 is powerful enough to do so and the second-year agrees to do what he can if that ever happens. 恵 plans to regroup at 呪術高専 and contact 天元様 . They need to find out how to unseal 五条悟 and what 夏油's concrete objectives are for the future. The 死滅回游 is jujutsu terrorism on a scale never seen before and 恵 believes they need answers to the aforementioned questions. 悠仁 asks if 九十九由基 would know and 恵 reveals this was her idea. 由基's hiding at 東京 呪術高専 waiting for them to while avoiding the higher-ups. The group infiltrates 呪術高専 and regroups with 真希 and 由基. 憂太 adds that there main issue with contacting 天元様 is the 薨星宮 is closed off. 天元様の concealing barrier shuffles over one thousand doors continuously and only one leads to the 薨星宮. 悠仁 interrupts because he can't hold off asking a certain question anymore. He asks what happened to 野薔薇 but only gets an encouraging, saddened look toward the ground as a response from 恵. Trying to contain his emotions, 悠仁 leans over and also looks to the ground while repeating "I get it". 脹相 abruptly makes it known that he may know a way past the concealing barrier. He gets a bit too close to 恵, who's uncomfortable with the interruption but 憂太 is glad he was listening. 悠仁 asks for clarification and 脹相 reminds them that 真人 stole 宿儺の指 and the 呪胎九相図 Wombs from 呪術高専 in the past. 脹相 believes they can achieve the same thing. The uncanny pathway to the 薨星宮. 悠仁, 恵, 憂太, and 脹相 enter 呪術高専 in secret and meet with 由基 and 真希 inside the same hidden room where 五条 had 悠仁 watch movies as training . 真希's appearance has changed significantly, her hair is much shorter, her left eye is covered in bandages, and much of her body is marked with severe burn scars from 漏瑚's flames. Concerned, 憂太 goes up to 真希 and asks if it's okay for her to be moving around. 由基 explains to him that not even a 反転術式 can prevent burn scars. 真希 was able to survive because of her physical durability granted to her through Heavenly Restriction . Resistance to curses wasn't enough to save 禪院直毘人 from similar injuries. 真希 says she wasn't exactly going for it and then asks 恵 about their plan to slip past the concealing barrier. 脹相 volunteers to inform the group and explains that between the correct door and the tomb is the cursed warehouse where his brothers are being stored. 脹相's connection to them will allow him to guide everyone to the correct door. 真希 is satisfied with the plan but she needs clarification on exactly who 脹相, this random newcomer, is. After a brief silence, 悠仁 reluctantly tells everyone to just think of 脹相 as his big brother for now. 脹相 is shocked and excited to hear 悠仁, yelling his name out. Embarrassed, 悠仁 guides everyone outside the room onto their mission, leaving 脹相 in the background. Master Tenge's shrine appears to reject everyone, or at least 由基. 脹相 guides the group to the correct door, confident that his brothers sleep beyond it. 悠仁 is surprised to find there is no solid path beyond the doors, just a massive drop into a forested area filled with tall, old trees. 由基 tells them to move forward and go deeper in so they can locate the elevator that can descend them toward the tomb. The group walks past the cursed warehouse, where 脹相 stops for a moment. He touches its doors and asks his brothers to wait just a little longer for him to return. The group takes the elevator down to the 薨星宮 and walks down the pathway toward where 天元 resides. 悠仁 notices bloodstains on the ground and asks what happened. 由基 says it's the remains of what happened eleven years ago when everything in the jujutsu world began to distort, picturing 伏黒甚爾 in her mind. The students are unsure of what she means, but 由基 moves on and leads them directly to the main shrine. They walk into nothing but a white void, confusing everyone. 天元 revealed! 由基 says 天元 is rejecting them. 天元 normally doesn't interact with the world but 由基 thought the contact was possible now that the 六眼 have been sealed. She also considers the possibility that 天元 isn't rejecting everyone, just her. 恵 is unsure of what to do and 憂太 tells everyone they should head back since 津美紀 doesn't have time to waste. Suddenly, a voice asks why they're leaving so soon, stopping the group from going. 天元様 reveals themself and says it's a pleasure to meet the children of the 禪院, Michizane 's descendant, the 呪胎九相図 Womb, and 宿儺's vessel.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 虎杖悠仁 伏黒恵 乙骨憂太 漏瑚 (回想) 五条悟 (想像) 加茂憲紀 (想像) 脹相 禪院真希 九十九由基 伏黒甚爾 (回想) 天元
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 呪術高専 薨星宮 薨星宮
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: Mentioned 呪胎: 呪胎九相図 天与呪縛／反転術式 術式 六眼

key_events_verified_phase8: 伏黒が津美紀の死滅回游参加と期限を説明する
虎杖が乙骨へ宿儺暴走時の処刑を依頼する
真希・九十九らと合流する
一行が天元に会うため薨星宮へ入る
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
